accurate.why: Accurately describes SBIC leverage changes (300%->200%), expanded private-capital definition, and rural/tech/manufacturer exclusions; matches the amendments to the Small Business Investment Act.

no_hallucinations.why: SBIC/SBA context is accurate, not invented.

states_purpose.why: States it modifies SBIC financing limits and private-capital definition.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes amendments to the Small Business Investment Act of 1958.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the exclusions and the cap on excluded amounts.

correct_figures.why: 300%->200% matches the text; dollar figures consistent with the bill's leverage provisions.
